commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates package/plugin catalog recommended fallback and cursor handling, skill catalog recommended sort support, plugins route default sort behavior, and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main still uses raw missing-cursor freshness for recommended fallback, and the PR head source shows the filtered route mismatch without needing a full runtime reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align the route visible sort state and add the missing regression test on this PR branch.

target.title: Stabilize package recommendation fallback sorting
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `recommended` sort support to skill-backed package catalog rows.
- Falls package/plugin catalog `recommended` browse back to `updated` when recommendation scores are missing or stale.
- Preserves fallback state in pagination cursors so later pages keep the same ordering mode.
- Defaults filtered plugin browse to `updated` when no sort is selected.
- Keeps explicit `sort=recommended` when a user chooses Recommended for persistent plugin filters.

## What Changed

Net diff against `main`:

```text
6 files changed, 412 insertions(+), 84 deletions(-)
```

Changed files:

- `convex/httpApiV1/packagesV1.ts`
- `convex/skills.ts`
- `convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts`
- `convex/skills.packageCatalog.test.ts`
- `src/routes/plugins/index.tsx`
- `src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx`

## Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A[Catalog request sort=recommended] --> B{Fresh first page?}
  B -- cursor already has fallback --> C[Continue updated fallback]
  B -- fresh --> D{Missing or stale scores?}
  D -- yes --> E[Use updated sort]
  D -- no --> F[Use recommended score sort]
  E --> G[Encode recommendedFallback=updated in cursor]
  F --> H[Return normal cursor]
```

## Proof

| Evidence | Claim Proved |
| --- | --- |
| `convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts` | Unified package and plugin catalog fallback uses `updated` only when recommendation scores need fallback, and keeps that mode through cursors. |
| `convex/skills.packageCatalog.test.ts` | Skill-backed package catalog accepts `recommended`, uses the score index when scores are ready, and falls back to `updated` while scores backfill. |
| `src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx` | Plugin browse defaults filtered browse to updated and preserves explicit Recommended for persistent filters. |

No screenshots are included. This PR changes API/request ordering and route state, not visual layout.

## Non-Goal

This does not fix production `/skills?sort=recommended`. That page uses `api.skills.listPublicPageV4`; this PR is for package/catalog and `/plugins` browse behavior.

## How To Test

```text
Open /plugins.
Confirm unfiltered browse requests recommended sorting.
Select a plugin category; confirm the URL has no sort param and the request uses updated sorting.
While filtered, select Recommended; confirm sort=recommended stays in the URL.
Page through recommended package/plugin catalog results and confirm ordering does not switch after the first page.
```

## Verification

```text
bunx convex codegen
VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bunx vitest run convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/skills.packageCatalog.test.ts src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/lib/packageApi.test.ts
bun run format:check -- convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/httpApiV1/packagesV1.ts convex/skills.packageCatalog.test.ts convex/skills.ts src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx
bun run ci:types-build
bun run ci:static
```

Result:

```text
convex codegen: passed
focused Vitest: 4 files passed, 426 tests passed
format check: passed
ci:types-build: passed
ci:static: passed
```
